AbsorberComponent.description: The absorber sub-object of an equipment detail (carries absorption).
AbsorberComponent.title: AbsorberComponent

CharacterProspect.description:
Forecast result or a not-found error shape.

The error branch sets ``error``/``rows``/``warnings``; the result branch
omits ``error`` and carries its forecast keys (passed through via
``extra="allow"``). Served with ``response_model_exclude_unset=True`` so the
two branches keep their distinct shapes.
CharacterProspect.title: CharacterProspect

CodexCalibrateResult.description: Acknowledgement of a direct codex-rank calibration.
CodexCalibrateResult.title: CodexCalibrateResult

CodexClaimResult.description: Acknowledgement of a claimed codex rank reward.
CodexClaimResult.title: CodexClaimResult

CodexMetaAttribute.description: A meta-codex attribute with its current calibrated level.
CodexMetaAttribute.title: CodexMetaAttribute

CodexMetaClaimResult.description: Acknowledgement of a claimed meta-codex attribute reward.
CodexMetaClaimResult.title: CodexMetaClaimResult

CodexRankBreakdown.description: A species' full 25-rank breakdown, cross-referenced with claims.
CodexRankBreakdown.title: CodexRankBreakdown

CodexRankItem.description: One of a species' 25 codex ranks, cross-referenced with claims.
CodexRankItem.title: CodexRankItem

CodexSkillOption.description: A skill choice for a codex rank, ranked by profession or HP gain.
CodexSkillOption.title: CodexSkillOption

CodexSpecies.description: A mob species row with codex base cost and player rank progress.
CodexSpecies.title: CodexSpecies

CostBreakdownLine.description: One line of a per-use cost breakdown.
CostBreakdownLine.title: CostBreakdownLine

CostResult.description: A standalone cost calculation (breakdown plus total).
CostResult.title: CostResult

Equipment.description: A library entry with computed per-use cost (the list shape).
Equipment.title: Equipment

EquipmentDetail.description: The expanded detail for a library item, with cost breakdown.
EquipmentDetail.title: EquipmentDetail

EquipmentSearchResult.description: A catalogue search hit, with ammo burn already converted to PEC.
EquipmentSearchResult.title: EquipmentSearchResult

GameConnection.description: The chat.log connection block of the settings response.
GameConnection.title: GameConnection

NotableEvent.description:
A dashboard activity-feed entry.

Covers both the notable-event payload (global/HoF/quest) and the tracker
warning entry, which share ``type``/``description``/``value`` and differ in
the optional ``eventType``/``timestamp``/``id`` keys.
NotableEvent.title: NotableEvent

OverlayPosition.description: The persisted overlay window position (null until first placed).
OverlayPosition.title: OverlayPosition

PlaylistAnalyticsRow.description: Per-playlist sustainability metrics from exact-match sessions.
PlaylistAnalyticsRow.title: PlaylistAnalyticsRow

PlaylistItem.description: A quest slot within a playlist.
PlaylistItem.title: PlaylistItem

Quest.description:
A quest as returned by the quest read/write endpoints.

Mirrors the frontend ``Quest`` type field-for-field, camelCase verbatim.
Every key is always emitted by ``_format_quest`` (nullables carry explicit
``null``), so the shape is stable and served without an exclude flag.
Quest.title: Quest

QuestAnalyticsRow.description: Per-quest sustainability metrics from curated linked sessions.
QuestAnalyticsRow.title: QuestAnalyticsRow

QuestPlaylist.description: A playlist as returned by the playlist read/write endpoints.
QuestPlaylist.title: QuestPlaylist

RecordingAbortResult.description: Acknowledgement that the in-flight recording was discarded.
RecordingAbortResult.title: RecordingAbortResult

RecordingStatus.description: Recording lifecycle state plus live capture counters.
RecordingStatus.title: RecordingStatus

RecordingStopResult.description:
The outcome of finalising a recording.

Polymorphic: the success branch carries ``finalized_path`` + ``determinism``
(and ``diff`` only on a determinism leak); the failure branch carries
``error`` + ``recovery_path``. Served with ``response_model_exclude_unset=True``
so each branch keeps its own keys rather than gaining a wall of nulls.
RecordingStopResult.title: RecordingStopResult

ScanAcceptResult.description: The result of accepting a pending scan: persisted count, or ``error``.
ScanAcceptResult.title: ScanAcceptResult

ScanCaptureResult.description: A capture result: status plus the captured page number and success flag.
ScanCaptureResult.title: ScanCaptureResult

ScanManualStatus.description:
The manual skill-scan status (GET /scan/skills/status).

Every key is always emitted (``error`` and ``last_scan_time`` carry explicit
null when idle), so it is served without an exclude flag.
ScanManualStatus.title: ScanManualStatus

ScanManualStatusOrError.description:
A scan verb result: the full status on success, or just ``error``.

The status fields are all optional and the route serialises with
``response_model_exclude_unset=True``, so the success branch emits the full
status while the refusal branch emits only ``error``.
ScanManualStatusOrError.title: ScanManualStatusOrError

ScanRejectResult.description: The result of rejecting a pending scan, or ``error``.
ScanRejectResult.title: ScanRejectResult

ScanUndoResult.description: An undo result: status plus the page number that was undone.
ScanUndoResult.title: ScanUndoResult

end_of_session_armour_reminder_enabled.title: End Of Session Armour Reminder Enabled

SkillScanPending.description: The held OCR result awaiting review: skill name to calibrated level.
SkillScanPending.title: SkillScanPending

TrackingSnapshot.description:
The consolidated dashboard hydration shape.

The union of the status, live, and recent-events readouts in one response:
a newly mounted dashboard hydrates from this once, then reacts to pushed
events rather than re-polling. Casing is preserved from the readouts it
unions: ``session_id`` / ``started_at`` / ``kill_count`` stay snake-case,
the headline numbers stay camelCase. Polymorphic across the three states;
served with ``response_model_exclude_unset=True`` so each state keeps its
own shape.
TrackingSnapshot.title: TrackingSnapshot

TrifectaPreset.description: One trifecta loadout preset with its readiness state.
TrifectaPreset.title: TrifectaPreset

TrifectaSettings.description: The trifecta block of the settings response.
TrifectaSettings.title: TrifectaSettings

WeaponComponent.description:
A weapon, amplifier, or scope sub-object of an equipment detail.

The amplifier and scope sub-objects are emitted by the same builder as the
weapon, so they carry ``damageEnhancers`` too (the frontend type omits it on
the amplifier; the handler emits it, so it is modelled here and kept).
WeaponComponent.title: WeaponComponent

get.description: Per-mob, per-tag, and per-weapon activity comparisons.
List all inventory items, newest first.

post.description: Create a new inventory item.

delete.description: Hard delete an inventory item (correction path, no ledger entry emitted).

patch.description: Edit fields on an inventory item. Bumps updated_at.

post.description:
Sell an inventory item: emit realised delta to ledger + remove row, atomically.

Zero-delta sales skip ledger emission (no noise row); the item is still
removed from the inventory ledger and ledgerEntry is returned as null.

get.description:
List all ledger entries.

The activity ledger is liquid economy only. Codex rewards live in
`codex_claims` and skill-typed quest rewards live in `quest_claims`.
New writes never produce PES-tagged ledger rows, so no read-side
filter is needed.

post.description: Create a new ledger entry.

get.description: List all ledger quick-entry presets.

post.description: Create a new ledger quick-entry preset.

get.description:
Cross-session sustainability metrics.

Total Return = (Loot TT + Skill TT + Ledger markup) / (Tracking cost + Ledger expenses).
?period= all | 30d | 90d | 1y
Return skill calibration status.
Return codex progress predictions for calibrated skills in codex categories.

Return skills ranked by PED cost per +1 HP.

Regular skills are ranked by how much PED of skill TT it costs to gain
1 HP through that skill alone at the player's current level.
Attributes are listed separately by HP contribution factor.

Return skills ranked by PED cost to next profession level.

Regular skills are ranked by how much PED of skill TT it would take
for that skill alone to push the profession to its next integer level.
Attributes are listed separately by raw contribution factor.

Find the cheapest skill allocation to reach a target profession level,
or the best allocation for a given PED budget.

Return profession levels with anchor and gain-since-anchor breakdown.

Both `level` (believed-current) and `anchorLevel` (last scan) are computed
via `profession_level()` against believed-current and anchor skills
respectively, so the running-sum's contribution is visible per profession.
The optimizer / prospect / codex paths compute the same way; the formula
is the canonical source for profession levels.
Forecast profession progression using observed session skill composition.
Return slice values available for Prospect forecasts.

Return calibrated skill levels with ranks and TT values.

Each row carries `level` (believed-current — anchor + chatlog/codex gains
since), `anchorLevel` (latest source='scan' row, or null if never scanned),
and `gainSinceAnchor` (level - anchorLevel, or null when no anchor exists).

Return HP and top profession levels.

HP is read directly from the scanned Health attribute level
(Health is an attribute whose in-game value equals the player's HP).

post.description: Set codex rank directly (manual calibration, no side effects).
Claim a codex rank reward.

get.description: Return the 6 attributes with current levels.

get.description: Get a single quest.

Complete a quest — resets cooldown, increments counter, auto-creates ledger entry.
Mark a quest as in-progress.
Discard the in-flight recording without finalising.
Begin a recording session.

get.description: Current recording state plus live capture counters.

post.description: Finalise the recording into the recorded-scenario corpus.

get.description: Return full settings including live cache stats.

patch.description: Partial update — only provided fields are written.

post.description: Reset all settings to defaults.
Immediately lock the selected catalogue mob for manual kill stamping.

get.description: Autocomplete suggestions for manual mob lock.

post.description: Release the currently locked mob.

delete.description: Delete a tracking session and all associated data.

get.description:
Get full session detail with aggregated summary.

Returns shape matching the frontend SessionDetail type.

post.description: Save armour repair cost to a session.

Bulk-activate every previously-deactivated `kill_loot_items`
row matching `item_name` in this session. Inverse of
bulk_deactivate.

Bulk-deactivate every `kill_loot_items` row matching `item_name`
in this session (item-name is URL-path encoded so spaces survive).

Atomically flips all active matching rows + rewrites each parent
kill's `loot_total_ped` + invalidates `session_summaries`. 404 if
the item isn't in this session at all; 409 if every matching row is
already deactivated.
Persist the curated quest analytics linkage decision for a session.

get.description: Get the curated post-session quest analytics linkage suggestion.

post.description:
Rewrite kills.mob_name for matching kills in this session.

Atomically: preserves the pre-edit `mob_name` into
`original_mob_name` via COALESCE (first-original semantics), rewrites
`mob_name` for every matching kill in the session, invalidates the
`session_summaries` cache row. 404 on missing session. 409 if the
`fromMobName` value has no matching kills in the session, or if
`fromMobName == toMobName` (the no-op rename would silently succeed
otherwise).
Run OCR on the bundled-anchor repair region. Returns result without saving.

Revert kills in this session whose current mob_name matches the
request and carry a preserved `original_mob_name`.

Inverse of rename-mob. Atomically: rewrites `mob_name` back to
`original_mob_name`, clears `original_mob_name`, invalidates the
`session_summaries` cache. 404 on missing session. 409 if no kills
in the session match the request (either nothing has been renamed
to that current name, or no preserved original exists to restore).

get.description:
List recent tracking sessions with aggregated stats.

Returns shapes matching the frontend TrackingSession type.

Consolidated dashboard hydration: one response a newly mounted webview
reads once, then keeps current from pushed events instead of re-polling.

post.description: Start a new tracking session.
Stop the active tracking session.
Immediately set the active free-text tag for tag-mode kill stamping.

get.description: Autocomplete suggestions for free-text session mob tags.
